outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Iran war news as Vance and Iranian officials meet for Pakistan talks
outlets.summary: CNN covers historic direct face-to-face US-Iran talks in Islamabad. Also: US intel says China preparing MANPAD delivery to Iran.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: U.S.-Iran peace talks underway in Islamabad after weeks of frantic diplomacy
outlets.summary: NPR provides detailed coverage of the Islamabad talks — first direct US-Iran negotiations since 1979. Vance-Ghalibaf face-to-face.

outlets.name: Newsweek
outlets.headline: Iran War Live Updates: New 24-Hour Deadline Looms as Trump Warns Strikes May Resume
outlets.summary: Newsweek covers Trump's 24-hour deadline. Warships 'reloaded with best ammunition.' USS Peterson/Murphy transit Hormuz.

outlets.name: Hot Air
outlets.headline: NEW: US Navy Warships Cross Strait of Hormuz For First Time; Mine Clearing Begins
outlets.summary: Hot Air covers the milestone of US warships transiting Hormuz — first since war began. CENTCOM mine clearing now underway.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: US-Iran direct talks on ending war under way in Pakistan
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers the shift from proximity to direct format. Iran red lines: Hormuz sovereignty, Lebanon ceasefire, frozen assets.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: U.S.-Iran talks underway in Islamabad after delegations arrive
outlets.summary: CNBC covers economic implications of talks. Oil down ~12% for week on optimism. Ghalibaf demands preconditions.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Report: U.S.-Iran Talks Reach 'Stalemate' Over Control of Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports talks reaching stalemate on Hormuz. Also: Iran still has 'thousands of missiles and launchers in underground sites.'

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: With Pakistan talks underway, Iran state TV says red lines include control of Hormuz, Lebanon truce
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog: Iran red lines at Islamabad talks. Israel rejects Lebanon ceasefire. Netanyahu corruption trial Sunday.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Islamabad talks: US must drop 'forever war' logic and 'Israel First' posture for any breakthrough
outlets.summary: PressTV editorial demands US abandon 'Israel First' posture. Calls for genuine ceasefire including Lebanon.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Frozen assets: Iran's non-negotiable condition for talks with US in Islamabad
outlets.summary: PressTV reports frozen assets release as 'non-negotiable' condition. US denies agreement on assets.
